description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

The SearchStax Provisioning API is a REST interface for creating and managing Solr deployments in the SearchStax Managed Search cloud. It supports deployment lifecycle management including creation, deletion, restart, backup and restore, node management, authentication configuration, webhook management, and usage reporting.
